transforms: Parse the public-domain point shapefile from the Stanford object.
Create stable border_crossing records with border and road transport modes.
Set operationalStatus to unknown because the source is historical reference data, not live crossing status.
Hold tower-style rows for later safety and identity review.
reviewNotes: Imported 30 stable named border crossing reference records from the March 12, 2014 HIU dataset. Held 2 tower-style rows, Hadallat (Tower 30/31) and Tower 22, because they need additional identity and safety review before publication.
